args.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.teigid) t.teigid
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr u
ON ST_Intersects(t.omrade, u.omrade)
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse k
ON u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = k.identifier
WHERE t.kommunenummer = '5001'  -- Trondheim municipality number
  AND k.description = 'Høy'      -- High risk class
ORDER BY t.teigid ASC
LIMIT 10;
